name: crud
description: Full-stack CRUD app for a single resource or small set of resources
productSnippet: CRUD for resource: create, list, read, update, delete. Single main entity with standard REST API and simple UI.

architectureHints.systemStyle: Modular Monolith — single deployable, clear internal layers
architectureHints.dataPattern: Repository via Prisma — one service per resource
architectureHints.frontendState: Local state + server components — no global state needed for simple CRUD
architectureHints.errorStrategy: Zod validation at route, domain errors mapped to HTTP codes

commonPatterns: List page with search and filter
quickStartPrompts: Build a CRUD app for managing inventory items
Build an admin panel for managing blog posts
